name: Florida Dietitian License
description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Florida - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

provider.name: Dietetics and Nutrition Practice Council
provider.parentOrganization: Florida Department of Health, Board of Medicine

address.streetAddress:
4052 Bald Cypress Way, Bin C-05
Tallahassee, FL 32399-3255
address.description: Florida Department of Health, Division of Medical Quality Assurance, 4052 Bald Cypress Way, Bin C-05, Tallahassee, FL 32399-3255

licenseDuration: Up to 2 Years (expires May 31 odd years)

requiredDocuments.name: Official transcripts
requiredDocuments.description: Must be sent directly from the educational institution.

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Examination or CDR
requiredDocuments.description: Verification sent directly to the Board.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

mainEntity.name: How much does a Florida dietitian license cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Florida Dietetics and Nutrition Practice Council charges a total initial fee of $165. This includes a $50 application fee, $110 license fee, and $5 unlicensed activity fee.

mainEntity.name: Is a background check required for a Florida dietitian license?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All applicants must undergo a Livescan fingerprint background check as part of the application process with the Florida Department of Health.

mainEntity.name: Does Florida have reciprocity for dietitians?

acceptedAnswer.text: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Florida. To work in Florida, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Florida?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 30 days (initial review).

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Florida while my endorsement application is processing?

acceptedAnswer.text: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
